summary: Re-verified ADR 0262 from the latest realistic origin/main baseline `bbb0f66b8ec995dfa3ecdd7bac9156ed664157cc` (VERSION 0.177.92, platform_version 0.130.61) on `codex/ws-0261-main-finish` by replaying the Keycloak and OpenFGA converges, confirming the delegated authorization store, tuples, and checks, issuing the ServerClaw runtime token from the internal Keycloak listener, and proving the governed `/v1/openfga` route remains live and protected.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py tests/test_mail_platform_runtime_role.py -q` passed with `27 passed`, and the earlier exact-main validation pass also completed `make generate-platform-vars`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models agent-standards`, `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/interface_contracts.py --validate`, and `python3 scripts/container_image_policy.py --validate` successfully.
`make converge-keycloak env=production` and `make converge-openfga env=production` both completed successfully from the exact-main replay baseline before the shared API gateway follow-up replays.

verification.check: Delegated authorization store and tuple verification
verification.observed: `curl -fsS -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/openfga/preshared-key.txt)" http://100.64.0.1:8014/stores` returned the `serverclaw-authz` store, and `python3 scripts/serverclaw_authz.py verify --config config/serverclaw-authz/bootstrap.json --openfga-url http://100.64.0.1:8014 --openfga-preshared-key-file /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/openfga/preshared-key.txt --keycloak-url http://10.10.10.20:8091` returned `verification_passed: true`.

verification.check: Runtime token issuance and governed gateway protection
verification.observed: A direct client-credentials request for `serverclaw-runtime` against `http://10.10.10.20:8091/realms/lv3/protocol/openid-connect/token` returned `token_type: Bearer` with the expected scope, and `https://api.lv3.org/v1/openfga/healthz` returned the canonical `AUTH_INSUFFICIENT_ROLE` envelope for the `lv3-agent-hub` bearer token, proving the route is live and still protected by the expected role gate.

notes: The first branch-local live apply for ADR 0262 remains recorded in `receipts/live-applies/2026-03-29-adr-0262-openfga-keycloak-live-apply.json`; this 2026-03-30 receipt records the latest realistic exact-main replay and verification state before the final merge-to-main step.
The exact-main replay baseline at verification time was origin/main commit `bbb0f66b8ec995dfa3ecdd7bac9156ed664157cc` with `VERSION` `0.177.92` and `platform_version` `0.130.61`.

origin/main advanced during closeout to commit `46df65e7f2227ca79a38035d2d24f53b6c02b5f8` with `VERSION` `0.177.93` and `platform_version` `0.130.62`, so the final merge path must reconcile that newer upstream before landing on main.
Protected integration files (`VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `README.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml`) intentionally remain pending until the final mainline merge and replay.
